stories: Good morning Sean, it's Sunday the tenth of May 2026 — and it's Mother's Day, so I hope you get to connect with family today
Fun fact: on this date in 1994, Nelson Mandela was inaugurated as South Africa's first democratically elected president
One of the most extraordinary moments of the twentieth century
Your calendar is clear today — enjoy the Sunday
At noon today, all Singtel users will get a sudden 10-second alarm — that's the SG Alert emergency system test, so don't be alarmed
Also, two Singaporeans were among three hikers killed in an eruption of Mount Dukono in Indonesia's North Maluku province
The volcano was already on elevated alert when they entered the restricted zone
On to the big picture, and Iran remains the dominant story — but with significant new developments

Good morning Sean, it's Saturday, the ninth of May 2026
Fun fact to start: May is the only month in which no sitting US President has ever died
Every other month has claimed at least one
So if you're running for the White House, May is your safest bet
Your calendar is clear today â enjoy the weekend
In Singapore, authorities are testing two residents for hantavirus after they were aboard the MV Hondius, a cruise ship linked to a deadly outbreak from Argentina
Both men are largely asymptomatic and risk to the public is assessed as low
Singapore Airlines also celebrated fifty years of uninterrupted Paris-Singapore service this week
